title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libwacom bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for libwacom is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The libwacom packages contain a library that provides access to a tablet model database. The libwacom packages expose the contents of this database to applications, allowing for tablet-specific user interfaces. The libwacom packages allow the GNOME tools to automatically configure screen mappings and calibrations, and provide device-specific configurations.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [libwacom] Add the missing latest generation Cintiq series [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-122206)  [libwacom] Add the missing propen3 stylus group [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-122207)  Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen Button Mapping UI Overlap [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-126355)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
full_text:
An update for libwacom is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The libwacom packages contain a library that provides access to a tablet model database. The libwacom packages expose the contents of this database to applications, allowing for tablet-specific user interfaces. The libwacom packages allow the GNOME tools to automatically configure screen mappings and calibrations, and provide device-specific configurations.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [libwacom] Add the missing latest generation Cintiq series [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-122206)  [libwacom] Add the missing propen3 stylus group [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-122207)  Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen Button Mapping UI Overlap [rhel-9.7.z] (JIRA:RHEL-126355)
